descriptionShort: Boston Globe hockey coverage of Providence College defeating Boston University 6-4 on March 6, 1988.
descriptionLong: Providence College defeated Boston University 6-4 at Walter Brown Arena on March 6, 1988, in a college hockey game. Providence's Andy Mattice scored twice, while Rick Bennett added a power-play goal with 5:39 remaining to secure the victory. BU's Mike Sullivan, Joe Sacco, and Tom Dion scored for the Terriers, who were outmatched despite mounting a comeback attempt. Providence's Gord Cruikshank achieved 96 career goals, becoming the school's all-time leading scorer.

attribution.headline: Providence defeats BU in hockey game
